rationale: The cited paper is used in the citing article's core theoretical positioning, including the contribution statement and a summary table of key global-local identity experiments. The citing paper also cites Gao et al. (2020) to justify identity-congruence logic (e.g., congruent cues increase processing fluency and response), which helps motivate its hypotheses. This is more than a passing mention because it informs how the authors frame their conceptual model and mechanism-based predictions.
relation_description: The citing paper builds on the cited paper's global-local identity and mindset/congruence stream, then tests that logic in a new domain: global-brand environmental sustainability messaging and engagement outcomes. It extends the prior line from price-sensitivity settings to message-framing effects and different mediating processes.
